articles.title: Zimbabwe play challenges proposed constitutional changes
articles.description: Bodo is a one-man performance that draws on Ngano, a traditional Shona storytelling method, blending it with modern visual and audio elements to create an immersive experience. Through this fusion of tradition and contemporary theatre, Guzha seeks not only to entertain but to provoke reflection

more.title: How the Skeleton of Mutapa Times is Based on Sarah Charlesworth's Work
more.description: Conceptual artist Sarah Charlesworth's 1979 study of how newspapers covered a solar eclipse inspired the framework behind The Mutapa Times.

more.title: Drone Solutions Zimbabwe Launches Rapid Medical Drone Delivery Network to Reach Remote Communities
more.description: HARARE — Zimbabwean technology firm Drone Solutions Zimbabwe has launched a drone-powered logistics network aimed at improving the delivery of medical supplies to hard-to-reach communities across the country. more.title: IMF warns South Africa of recession
more.description: JOHANNESBURG – The International Monetary Fund (IMF) has warned that the global economy faces recession if the conflict in the Middle East continues—with energy-importing countries like South Africa at even greater risk. In a report published last week, IMF economists warned that a longer or broader conflict could significantly weaken growth and destabilise financial markets.
